twitter_thread: 85% of AI face swap apps use just 3 AI engines: Dlib, FaceNet, and DeepFace.
Top performers combine DeepFaceLab and FaceSwap for 25% higher accuracy.
Custom-trained models boost face swap accuracy by 32% over pre-trained ones.
Manual face landmark adjustment improves results by 20% in apps like FaceSwap.
Beware of 'AI-powered' apps using pre-set templates, like Snapchat's generic filters.
Only 12 of 50 face swap apps tested allow manual landmark adjustments.
What's the most realistic face swap you've seen an app produce? #aifaceswap #apps
pack.linkedin: The AI face swap landscape is dominated by 3 AI engines: Dlib, FaceNet, and DeepFace, used by 85% of apps. Combining DeepFaceLab and FaceSwap yields 25% higher accuracy. However, custom-trained models can improve accuracy by 32%, and manual face landmark adjustments boost results by 20%. Given these numbers, what separates a good face swap app from a great one in your experience?
tiktok_hooks: 3 AI engines power 85% of face swap apps

pack.reddit_headline: Are 85% of AI face swap apps just rebranding the same 3 AI engines?
